--- Main Page ---
Muss & Turners
Skip to content
Deli by day and bistro by night.
Come as you are, enjoy yourself and be comfortable.
Our Menus
RESERVE A TABLE
FOR 20 YEARS, WE’VE BEEN PROUD TO CALL SMYRNA, GEORGIA HOME, GROWING FROM A HUMBLE DELI & GOURMET FOOD / WINE RETAILER INTO A BELOVED CASUAL NEIGHBORHOOD SPOT WHERE “FOIE GRAS IN FLIP FLOPS” IS A WAY OF LIFE.
At Muss & Turner’s, we’ve evolved from “the little deli that could” into a true community staple, serving lunch, dinner, brunch, and creative cocktails in
Eleanor’s
, our hidden speakeasy bar. Recognized by
Food & Wine as one of America’s Best Delis
and by
Food Network as one of the Best Delis in the Country
, we’re known for our inventive sandwiches, globally inspired dishes, and warm hospitality.
Whether you’re in the mood for a hearty lunch, a cozy dinner, or a weekend brunch, Muss & Turner’s is where great food with no culinary boundaries, good company, and the heart of Smyrna-Vinings community come together.

meta.meta_description: Welcome to Muss & Turners, a restaurant founded by 3 locals. We believe that people matter most. Click here to check out our exclusive menus.
